# Reference Mining Guide (Per Project)

The project-specific mining record. Reference docs: `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/21-reference-mining-moodboard.md`, `45-reference-mining-and-moodboards.md`, `61-current-awwwards-benchmark-mining.md`.

The outputs of mining live in `benchmark-reference-board.md`. This guide is the **process trace**: where we searched, what we evaluated, what we discarded, and why.
